todo.name: Carmel Market (Shuk HaCarmel)

restaurants.name: Carnivore Restaurant

restaurants.name: Talisman Restaurant

restaurants.name: Habesha Ethiopian Restaurant

todo.name: Nike Art Gallery

todo.name: Tarkwa Bay Beach

restaurants.name: Nok by Alara

restaurants.name: Shiro Lagos

restaurants.name: Bungalow Bar & Kitchen

todo.name: Kwame Nkrumah Memorial Park

todo.name: Makola Market

restaurants.name: Buka Restaurant

restaurants.name: Santoku

restaurants.name: Azmera Ethiopian Restaurant

restaurants.name: La Sqala

todo.name: Medina of Tunis

restaurants.name: Le Baroque

restaurants.name: Fondouk El Attarine

restaurants.name: Le Tantonville

restaurants.name: Restaurant La Brise

restaurants.name: Le Safir

restaurants.name: Kategna

restaurants.name: Sushi Masa

todo.name: National Museum of Tanzania

todo.name: Coco Beach (Oyster Bay Beach)

restaurants.name: The Waterfront Restaurant

restaurants.name: Addis in Dar

restaurants.name: Gatto Matto

restaurants.name: Fang Fang Restaurant

restaurants.name: Latitude 15

restaurants.name: Rhapsody's

restaurants.name: Mint Restaurant

todo.name: National Gallery of Zimbabwe

todo.name: Mukuvisi Woodlands

restaurants.name: Gava's Restaurant

restaurants.name: Feijão Verde
